hero.tagline: Senior Full-Stack Engineer focused on web architecture, SaaS products, and hands-on technical leadership.
hero.subtitle: I build scalable, maintainable, and reliable React, Next.js, and Node.js applications for product teams that need to move with speed and quality.

about.title: Technical leadership for scalable web products
about.firstParagraph: I work across product, engineering, and design to turn complex systems into sustainable web applications. My work combines full-stack architecture, performance, CI/CD, code quality, and a constant focus on the experience of both users and the people maintaining the product.
about.secondParagraph: I bring 7+ years of experience shipping critical features, modernizing legacy modules, guiding technical decisions, and mentoring engineers in fast-moving SaaS environments.

strengths.title: Core strengths
strengths.subtitle: Areas where I help teams gain clarity, speed, and delivery confidence.

list.title: Architecture & Maintainability
list.description: I structure frontends, backends, and monorepos to reduce coupling, support evolution, and lower technical debt.

list.title: Performance & Scalability
list.description: I optimize critical flows, queries, server state, and rendering to improve latency, throughput, and user experience.

list.title: CI/CD & Developer Experience
list.description: I improve pipelines, testing strategies, and delivery patterns so teams can ship confidently without slowing down.

list.title: Product Engineering Leadership
list.description: I connect technical decisions to product goals, working with design, backend, and leadership to ship reliable software.

impact.title: Selected impact
impact.subtitle: Recent technical outcomes across SaaS products and production web platforms.

list.title: Higher developer velocity
list.description: Architected a modular migration of a core module, using WebSockets for real-time UI state synchronization.

list.title: Less time in critical workflows
list.description: Optimized backend flows with concurrent processing, improving throughput for core entity operations.

list.title: Lower latency in critical services
list.description: Refactored backend services and database queries while keeping robust access controls and rate limiting.

list.title: Lower build memory usage
list.description: Modernized the CI/CD pipeline and build process, improving deployment stability and efficiency.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Product engineering, web architecture, and technical leadership

list.description: Led the development of a new admin panel, re-architected the authentication layer with better-auth, and optimized backend workflows, reducing execution time by roughly 66%. Also defined CI/CD improvements with a FIFO merge queue and multi-stage testing strategy.

Architected a modular migration of a core monolithic module for a team of 4, using WebSockets for real-time state synchronization. Optimized Node.js/TypeScript services, reducing campaign processing time by 33%, latency by 40%, and build memory usage by 50%.

Led frontend initiatives, defined the technical foundation for a full-stack monorepo with Hono, Next.js, and Turborepo, documented engineering protocols, and delivered workshops and mentorship for JavaScript developers.
Owned the frontend roadmap for a crypto fundraising platform, shipping complex financial dashboards, optimizing server state with React Query, and creating a library of 20+ reusable UI components.
Delivered 10+ digital products end-to-end, including Node.js/React solutions for scheduling and benefit validation. Improved performance, Core Web Vitals, and conversion for agency clients.
Built administrative web apps, real-time presentation tools, and process automations for non-profit organizations, turning manual workflows into accessible web products.

rendering_patterns.description: Talk on rendering patterns (such as SSR, SSG, CSR, etc.) as well as their advantages and disadvantages. Presented at PotiDayJS 2023.
